title: cynanchum loheri
intro: Cynanchum loheri, also known as the Loher's vine or Loher's snail vine, is a climbing plant species in the dogbane family Apocynaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the Philippines, where it is believed to have medicinal properties due to its bioactive compounds and alkaloids. The health benefits of Cynanchum loheri include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, such as fever, colds, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, Cynanchum loheri is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are believed to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
